steps.t: Nan Curunír lies to the north of the Ford of Isen. Grimbold has sent you to the Vale of Nan Curunír and suggested that you might find a friend awaitin…
Nan Curunír stretches forth beyond Dagoras' camp. Dagoras has suggested that you scout the southern part of Nan Curunír.
Nan Curunír stretches forth beyond Dagoras' camp. Dagoras has suggested that you scout the southern part of Nan Curunír.
Nan Curunír stretches forth beyond Dagoras' camp. Dagoras has suggested that you scout the southern part of Nan Curunír.
Nan Curunír stretches forth beyond Dagoras' camp. Dagoras has suggested that you scout the southern part of Nan Curunír.
Dagoras is encamped near the entrance to Nan Curunír. You should return to Dagoras and let him know what you have found.
